rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(102, 102, 102), rgb(149, 149, 149));

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(102, 204, 255), rgb(6, 93, 137)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(102, 204, 255), rgb(6, 93, 137));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(153, 204, 255), rgb(30, 74, 118)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18));
